name: party-supply-chat-agent
description: Lightweight chat agent with Bedrock AgentCore, Strands SDK, and S3 RAG

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd agent && npm install && cd ../chat-ui && npm install

_awsSdkPinning: Root package uses AWS SDK clients from scripts/ (generate-seed-data, import-csv-data). Keep all @aws-sdk/client-* on a single exact version so npm can't resolve individual clients to newer patches whose @smithy/core requirements don't match. Bump in lockstep with agent/ and lambda/ package.json.
